task: Examine racial and ethnic disparities in the hypertension control cascade (prevalence, awareness, treatment, and control) among U.S. adults using pooled NHANES 2013-2018 data. The analysis should: (1) estimate age-standardized prevalence of hypertension by race/ethnicity (White, Black, Hispanic, Asian, Other) using survey-weighted methods; (2) calculate the proportion aware of their hypertension, currently treated, and with controlled blood pressure (<140/90 mmHg) within each racial/ethnic group; (3) use multivariable logistic regression to compute adjusted odds ratios for hypertension awareness, treatment, and control comparing each racial/ethnic minority group to White adults as the reference, adjusting for age, sex, insurance status, education, income, BMI, diabetes, and cardiovascular disease history; (4) present the hypertension control cascade (prevalence -> awareness -> treatment -> control) stratified by race/ethnicity. Hypertension is defined as systolic BP >= 140 mmHg, diastolic BP >= 90 mmHg, or current use of antihypertensive medication. All analyses must incorporate NHANES complex survey design variables.

data.name: NHANES 2013-2018 Demographics (3 cycles)
data.description: Demographic variables including age, sex, self-reported race/ethnicity, education, income-to-poverty ratio, and health insurance status from NHANES cycles 2013-2014, 2015-2016, and 2017-2018.

data.name: NHANES 2013-2018 Blood Pressure Examination
data.description: Up to 3 consecutive BP readings per participant from the MEC examination component across 3 NHANES cycles.

data.name: NHANES 2013-2018 Questionnaire Data
data.description: Self-reported hypertension diagnosis, antihypertensive medication use, diabetes diagnosis, and CVD history.

data.name: NHANES 2013-2018 Prescription Medication
data.description: Current prescription medications with therapeutic classification codes for identifying antihypertensive agents.

data.name: Variable Codebook
data.description: Complete variable definitions, value labels, and survey design notes for pooled NHANES 2013-2018 analysis.
